Careers at Elite Physio Ottawa
Join Our Passionate Team of Physiotherapy Professionals

At Elite Physio Ottawa, we are more than just a clinic—we are a community of dedicated professionals committed to providing exceptional care to our patients and fostering a thriving team environment. If you’re passionate about physiotherapy, wellness, and helping others achieve their best, we’d love to have you on our team!

We believe in creating a workplace where collaboration, innovation, and growth take center stage. Our clinic thrives on a culture of respect, learning, and excellence, and we’re always looking for talented individuals who share our values and vision.

Registered Massage Therapist

We’re seeking a passionate Registered Massage Therapist to join our collaborative, patient-focused clinic in Ottawa West. Enjoy a supportive multidisciplinary team, flexible scheduling, a strong referral base, and opportunities for professional growth—all in a warm and welcoming environment.

Join Our Team! Submit Your Application Below

We’re excited you’re interested in joining the Elite Physio Ottawa team! Please fill out the application form below and attach the necessary documents. A member of our team will review your submission and get back to you shortly.

What We’re Looking For

We seek professionals who are

Passionate about physiotherapy and health advocacy.
Driven to provide the highest level of patient-focused care
Team
